title: Git
description: Master local repositories, files staging, commit snapshots, branching strategies, stashing, tagging, and remote workflows.

courses.title: Git Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn the primary concepts, staging area, commit snapshots, and repository management.

courses.title: Branching & Merging
courses.description: Deploy isolated environments using pointers, merge branches, and resolve conflicts.

courses.title: Advanced Git
courses.description: Optimize logs history utilizing stashes, reflog recoveries, tags, and custom settings.

courses.title: Team Workflows
courses.description: Coordinate work across remote origins, sync branches, and resolve complex merge conflicts.

title: Linux
description: Master files navigation, path routing, permissions security, shell scripting, networking, processes, and service management.

courses.title: Linux Command Line Basics
courses.description: Learn filesystem navigation, path routing, and basic CLI commands.

courses.title: Linux File System & Permissions
courses.description: Understand absolute/relative paths, chown, chmod, user management, and permissions security.

courses.title: Bash Scripting Fundamentals
courses.description: Write automation scripts, learn loops, conditional execution, variables, inputs, and shebangs.

courses.title: Linux Networking & Processes
courses.description: Manage processes, inspect active socket routing tables, ports, networks, and services.

courses.title: Linux Capstone Project
courses.description: A comprehensive DevOps project combining scripting, user permissions, networking, log rotation, and app deployment.

title: Docker
description: Master container packaging, networking, storage, volume management, and multi-container architectures.

courses.title: Docker Fundamentals
courses.description: Introduction to container runtimes, pull operations, port mapping, and volume configurations.

courses.title: Multi-Container with Docker Compose
courses.description: Deploy a multi-tier database and web application stack locally using Docker Compose YAML.

courses.title: Optimizing Dockerfiles
courses.description: Build high-security minimal containers utilizing multi-stage configurations and alpine base runtimes.

courses.title: Docker Networking Deep Dive
courses.description: Configure overlay networks, bridge adapter bindings, and investigate custom iptables routing.

title: Kubernetes
description: Learn production-grade container orchestration, deployments, ingress, storage claims, and service discovery.

courses.title: Kubernetes Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn the core components, control plane processes, and worker node architectures of Kubernetes.

courses.title: Pods
courses.description: Deploy, inspect, and manage single and multi-container Pod workloads in Kubernetes namespaces.

courses.title: Deployments
courses.description: Scale state-free container stacks, perform zero-downtime updates, and manage deployment rollbacks.

courses.title: ReplicaSets
courses.description: Understand how ReplicaSet controllers reconcile Pod instance counts automatically.

courses.title: Services
courses.description: Expose application pods using stable ClusterIP, NodePort, and LoadBalancer configurations.

courses.title: Namespaces
courses.description: Organize and secure multiple independent project resources within the same Kubernetes cluster.

courses.title: ConfigMaps
courses.description: Decouple configurations variables from container images using ConfigMap stores.

courses.title: Secrets
courses.description: Inject token variables, API keys, and database passwords securely using Secret models.

courses.title: Persistent Volumes
courses.description: Define persistent cluster storage assets independent of individual Pod lifecycles.

courses.title: Persistent Volume Claims
courses.description: Bind application resource requests dynamically to suitable Persistent Volumes.

courses.title: Ingress
courses.description: Route external L7 HTTP/HTTPS traffic to internal services using ingress routing rules.

courses.title: Rolling Updates
courses.description: Perform updates and configure maxSurge and maxUnavailable values for deployments.

courses.title: Jobs & CronJobs
courses.description: Run short-lived batch computations and schedule recurring cron tasks inside K8s.

courses.title: Resource Requests & Limits
courses.description: Configure compute limits and requests to optimize CPU and RAM distribution models.

courses.title: Autoscaling (HPA)
courses.description: Scale deployment replicas dynamically based on real-time CPU utilization metrics.

courses.title: Helm Basics
courses.description: Install, upgrade, roll back, and package Kubernetes applications using Helm Charts.

courses.title: Production Best Practices
courses.description: Configure liveness probes, readiness endpoints, security contexts, and resource quotas.

courses.title: Capstone Project
courses.description: Deploy a complete multi-tier application stack with deployment modules, config sets, secrets, and PVCs.

title: Terraform
description: Build Infrastructure as Code using HCL declarations, state storage, variables, and reusable modules.

courses.title: Terraform Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn HCL declarative syntax and initialize local workspaces.

courses.title: Installing Terraform & Providers
courses.description: Understand registry provider configurations and resource plugins.

courses.title: Variables, Outputs & Locals
courses.description: Customized parameter boundaries and local variables scope.

courses.title: Resources & Dependencies
courses.description: Configure explicit resource ordering and handle state graphs.

courses.title: State Management
courses.description: Inspect tfstate cache structures and track active resources.

courses.title: Modules
courses.description: Import dry modular packages and scale infrastructure setups.

courses.title: Provisioners
courses.description: Add local-exec bootstrap commands within resource components.

courses.title: Workspaces
courses.description: Isolate environment states using workspace CLI commands.

courses.title: Remote State Concepts
courses.description: Deploy backend state settings and check team lock files.

courses.title: Best Practices
courses.description: Incorporate style guide formatting and linting validations.

courses.title: Terraform Capstone Project
courses.description: Integrate multi-tier setups, inputs, and outputs validation checks.

title: AWS
description: Implement enterprise cloud resources in Amazon Web Services including VPCs, IAM policies, and S3.

courses.title: AWS S3 Storage Basics
courses.description: Configure object versioning, access control lists, and bucket lifecycle policies.

courses.title: IAM Users and Policies
courses.description: Configure user scopes, roles, groups, and authorize granular permissions using JSON templates.

courses.title: Multi-AZ VPC Setup
courses.description: Provision high-availability subnets, internet/NAT gateways, and custom route bindings.

title: Azure
description: Deploy infrastructure components to Microsoft Azure cloud including VMs, blob storage, and identity management.

courses.title: Azure Virtual Machines
courses.description: Provision Linux Virtual Machines on Azure and establish secure ssh keys associations.

courses.title: Azure Blob Storage Configuration
courses.description: Deploy blob storage containers, customize access tiers, and authorize access using SAS tokens.

title: Ansible
description: Configure and automate system deployments via declarative Ansible Playbooks and Roles.

courses.title: Introduction to Ansible
courses.description: Learn the primary push-based configuration management concepts of Ansible.

courses.title: Inventory Files & Hosts
courses.description: Structure target host groups, INI properties, and connection variables.

courses.title: Ad-hoc Commands
courses.description: Trigger quick module execution scripts directly on target node groupings.

courses.title: Writing Playbooks
courses.description: Deploy stateful configuration states using structured YAML playbook definitions.

courses.title: Variables & Facts
courses.description: Declare custom play variables and query dynamically gathered host system facts.

courses.title: Templates & Jinja2
courses.description: Compile dynamic text configuration files using the Jinja2 rendering engine.

courses.title: Roles
courses.description: Organize tasks, templates, handlers, and variables into modular roles path structures.

courses.title: Ansible Galaxy
courses.description: Import and configure shared community roles utilizing Ansible Galaxy CLI.

courses.title: Tags, Handlers & Conditionals
courses.description: Incorporate task tags, conditional when blocks, and event notify handlers.

courses.title: Best Practices
courses.description: Organize group_vars variable scopes and perform syntax validations.

courses.title: Ansible Capstone Project
courses.description: Deliver a complete multi-role web services automation deployment workflow.

title: GitHub Actions
description: Master automated workflows, triggers, runners, continuous integration, artifact storage, and secure continuous deployment pipelines.

courses.title: GitHub Actions Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn workflows configurations, job parallelisms, triggers, and runner environments.

courses.title: Building CI Pipelines
courses.description: Checkout code repositories, manage Node/Python setups, and run shell steps.

courses.title: Testing & Artifact Management
courses.description: Run tests and save output artifacts using upload-artifact actions.

courses.title: Automated Deployments
courses.description: Securely deploy release packages utilizing encrypted Secrets and environments.

title: CI/CD
description: Master the principles of Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery, and Continuous Deployment. Build clean automated gates and pipelines.

courses.title: Introduction to CI/CD
courses.description: Learn the software delivery lifecycle, pipelines, and manual vs automated delivery principles.

courses.title: Continuous Integration
courses.description: Automate code checks, syntax rules, compilation validation, and unit testing scripts.

courses.title: Continuous Delivery
courses.description: Package build iterations and maintain package registry releases behind manual approval checkpoints.

courses.title: Continuous Deployment
courses.description: Automate final staging and production deployment gates safely without manual triggers.

courses.title: Building a Complete CI/CD Pipeline
courses.description: Orchestrate complex pipelines combining compile gates, test scripts, approvals, and rollbacks.

title: Jenkins
description: Master declarative and scripted build automation pipelines using the industry standard Jenkins automation server.

courses.title: Jenkins Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn the main elements of Jenkins architecture including master, agent, and executors configurations.

courses.title: Installing & Configuring Jenkins
courses.description: Install, run, and secure a Jenkins controller environment with basic plugins.

courses.title: Freestyle Jobs
courses.description: Configure graphical linear build tasks, build triggers, and file collections properties.

courses.title: Pipeline as Code (Jenkinsfile)
courses.description: Learn to declare multi-stage build pipelines committed as text alongside code.

courses.title: Declarative vs Scripted Pipelines
courses.description: Understand structured Declarative syntax and compare it to imperatively scripted Groovy node blocks.

courses.title: Distributed Builds & Agents
courses.description: Distribute resource compile execution pipelines across isolated agent pools via node labels.

courses.title: Credentials & Secrets Management
courses.description: Safely bind database logins, API keys, and SSH keys in runtime variables environments.

courses.title: Plugins & Integrations
courses.description: Integrate third-party build status reports, Slack messaging webhooks, and git events hooks.

courses.title: Building a Complete CI/CD Pipeline
courses.description: Combine compilation steps, lint operations, automated unit tests, and final deployment rules.

courses.title: Jenkins Best Practices
courses.description: Configure log file pruning rules and backup server details to reduce master loads.

courses.title: Jenkins Capstone Project
courses.description: Deploy a multi-stage production deployment pipeline with artifacts archival and rollbacks.

title: Monitoring
description: Scrape node metrics, query timeseries alerts, and configure dashboard visualizations using Prometheus.

courses.title: Prometheus Basics
courses.description: Scrape node metrics and write basic PromQL syntax to review system indicators.

courses.title: Grafana Visualization
courses.description: Author telemetry dashboards using Prometheus metrics and define dynamic alert hooks.

title: Observability
description: Analyze distributed logs and traces using Elastic Stack (ELK), Jaeger tracing, and open telemetry.

courses.title: Log Aggregation with ELK
courses.description: Collect, index, and visualize application logs using Elasticsearch, Logstash, and Kibana.

courses.title: Distributed Tracing with Jaeger
courses.description: Trace request lifetimes across multi-service deployments using open telemetry tracing.
